ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Timepoint/visit label
Notes: e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: In the past 7 days, my sleep quality was....
Notes: 1 = Very good; 2 = Good; 3 = Fair; 4 = Poor; 5 = Very poor

ElementDescription: In the past 7 days, my sleep was refreshing....
Notes: 1 = Very much; 2 = Quite a bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = A little bit; 5 = Not at all

ElementDescription: In the past 7 days, I had a problem with my sleep....
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: In the past 7 days, I had difficulty falling asleep....
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: In the past 7 days, my sleep was restless....
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: In the past 7 days, I tried hard to get to sleep....
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: PROMIS Sleep Disturbance 4A: T-Score
PROMIS Sleep Disturbance 6A: T-Score
Language of survey
PROMIS Sleep Disturbance-SF 6a (Item 2): Sleep was Refreshing
Notes: 1 = Very much; 2 = Quite a bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = A little bit; 5 = Not at all

ElementDescription: PROMIS Sleep Disturbance-SF 6a (Item 1): Sleep Quality
Notes: 1 = Very good; 2 = Good; 3 = Fair; 4 = Poor; 5 = Very poor

ElementDescription: PROMIS Sleep Disturbance-SF 6a (Item 3): I had a problem with my sleep
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: PROMIS Sleep Disturbance-SF 6a (Item 4): I had difficulty falling asleep
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: PROMIS Sleep Disturbance-SF 6a (Item 5): My sleep was restless
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: PROMIS Sleep Disturbance-SF 6a (Item 6): I tried hard to get to sleep
Notes: 1 = Not at all; 2 = A little bit; 3 = Somewhat; 4 = Quite a bit; 5 = Very much

ElementDescription: PROMIS Sleep Disturbance (6 item; continuous) raw score
Notes: Scored as sum of 6 items; blank if any items are missing

ElementDescription: PROMIS Sleep Disturbance (6 item; continuous) T-score
Notes: T-score based on raw score and published conversion table. The T-score rescales the raw score into a standardized T-score with a mean of 50 and a standard deviation of 10
